experiment_title: AgCl沉淀在氨水中的溶解性实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="AgCl沉淀在氨水中的溶解性实验" goal="观察并分析AgCl沉淀在1 mol/L氨水中的变化，判断其是否溶解" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="AgCl_precipitate" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Ammonia_solution_1mol_L" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="AgCl" mass="0.2 g" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NH3" volume="5 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="stand_1" id="step_2" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_4" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 在试管中加入AgCl沉淀和1 mol/L氨水，准备反应体系。
将试管固定在试管架上并充分搅拌混合物。
静置30秒，观察AgCl沉淀在氨水中的变化，判断其是否溶解。
